title: Fix link popup button spacing and apply font-mono to URL

requirements.text: In the ExternalLinkDisclaimerModal component, add sufficient horizontal or vertical spacing between the Continue and Cancel buttons so they are not cramped against each other.

quotes: the continue and cancel button are brushing up against each other. they need to be spaced out a bit

acceptanceCriteria: The Continue and Cancel buttons in the external link disclaimer popup have visible spacing between them on desktop
Buttons do not visually touch or overlap each other

requirements.text: In the ExternalLinkDisclaimerModal component, apply the `font-mono` Tailwind class to the element displaying the target external URL.

quotes: can you use font-mono for the link displayed in the popup

acceptanceCriteria: The displayed URL in the external link disclaimer popup uses a monospace font
No other text in the popup is affected by this font change

constraints: Only modify ExternalLinkDisclaimerModal.tsx — do not change any other files
nonGoals: Changing any other component styles or layouts
Altering button functionality or navigation behavior
